'''Balto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. He was the [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] of [[Lilta]], and the couple had several kids together. Balto helped [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Pitareeze]] escape the clutches of [[Olag Greck]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1994) 1|''Droids'' (1994) 1]] {{1st}}
